name: Naruto Fanfic - Recut
description: Access the Narucannon Recut fanedit series from PixelDrain.

search.code: const axios = require('axios'); const cheerio = require('cheerio'); async function search() { const url = 'https://pixeldrain.net/d/CEG3sGRE'; try { const response = await axios.get(url); const $ = cheerio.load(response.data); const results = []; $('a.file-item__link, a[href*="/d/"]').each((i, element) => { const href = $(element).attr('href'); const title = $(element).text().trim() || $(element).find('.file-item__name').text().trim(); if (href && !href.includes('.search_index.gz') && title) { const isSeason = /^\d+\s*-\s*/.test(title) && !title.includes('.'); const seasonMatch = title.match(/^(\d+)\s*-\s*(.+)/); results.push({ title: title, id: href, meta: { isSeason: isSeason, seasonNumber: seasonMatch ? parseInt(seasonMatch[1], 10) : null, seasonName: seasonMatch ? seasonMatch[2] : title } }); } }); return results; } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching from PixelDrain:', error); return []; } } search();

extractor.code: const fileId = window._sora_item_id; if (!fileId) { return { error: 'No file ID provided' }; } const directUrl = 'https://pixeldrain.com/api/file/' + fileId + '?download'; return [{ name: 'Direct Download', url: directUrl, quality: 'default' }];

catalog.code: const axios = require('axios'); const cheerio = require('cheerio'); async function catalog() { const url = 'https://pixeldrain.net/d/CEG3sGRE'; try { const response = await axios.get(url); const $ = cheerio.load(response.data); const seasons = {}; const episodes = {}; $('a.file-item__link, a[href*="/d/"]').each((i, element) => { const href = $(element).attr('href'); const title = $(element).text().trim() || $(element).find('.file-item__name').text().trim(); if (!href || href.includes('.search_index.gz') || !title) return; const seasonMatch = title.match(/^(\d+)\s*-\s*(.+)/); const isSeason = /^\d+\s*-\s*/.test(title) && !title.includes('.'); if (isSeason && seasonMatch) { const seasonNum = parseInt(seasonMatch[1], 10); seasons[seasonNum] = { id: href.replace('/d/', ''), name: seasonMatch[2], number: seasonNum }; } else if (!isSeason) { const episodeId = href.replace('/d/', ''); episodes[episodeId] = { title: title, id: episodeId }; } }); return { seasons: Object.values(seasons), episodes: episodes }; } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching catalog:', error); return { seasons: [], episodes: {} }; } } catalog();
